Hero.description: A strategic bag manufacturing partner integrating two decades of experience with modern production systems.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be a trusted bag manufacturer delivering superior quality, sustainable innovation, and efficient production systems to consistently support client brand growth in international markets.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Committed to empowering local artisans, utilizing modern technology, and strict quality control standards to ensure every product has high competitive value and services.

Product.title: INDUSTRIAL
Product.noDataDesc: Sorry, products for the {category} category are currently being updated.

modal.defaultDesc: High-quality industrial products manufactured with WARTIWAN Industrial precision standards.

waistbag.title: Waistbag Series
waistbag.desc: Present an exclusive waistbag collection for your business scale. Designed with ergonomic shapes and rugged materials, Wartiwan Industri Nusantara is ready to manufacture these articles with specifications and branding details fully customizable to your brand identity.

backpack.title: Backpack Series
backpack.desc: Realize your large-scale flagship product line with our high-capacity, durable backpack collection. Through PT WIN's manufacturing facilities, every compartment and stitch construction is ready to be precisely customized to carry your brand pride in every consumer activity.

totebag.title: Totebag Series
totebag.desc: Enhance the visual appeal of your fashion line through our versatile and aesthetic totebag series. We blend casual practicality with accurate material cutting techniques, offering high-quality canvas or nylon as the perfect canvas to highlight your brand's design character to a wider market.

slingbag.title: Sling Bag Series
slingbag.desc: Meet the mobility needs of urban dwellers with our compact and dynamic sling bag line. We ensure every functional detail, from smooth zippers to strap durability, is produced through strict quality control standards, making it an essential daily product representing your brand's superior quality.

totepack.title: Totepack Series
totepack.desc: Introduce multifunctional innovation to your catalog with our practical hybrid totepack design. Designed for a flexible transition from carry-on to backpack, our manufacturing team is ready to execute these complex patterns with the best selected materials, specifically to complete your brand's exclusive collection.

pouch.title: Pouch Series
pouch.desc: Complete your retail product variety with our versatile pouch series that prioritizes space efficiency and neatness. With large-scale detailed craftsmanship, Wartiwan Industri Nusantara accommodates the addition of custom embroidery, labels, or screen printing to perfect your brand's accessory portfolio.

laptop.title: Laptop Bag / Laptop Sleeve Series
laptop.desc: Offer maximum protection wrapped in a professional look through our premium laptop bag collection. Equipped with solid foam padding structures and water-repellent material options, trust PT WIN for the production process to produce tough work gear that elevates your brand's credibility.

shoesbag.title: Shoes Bag Series
shoesbag.desc: Enhance the value of your sports and travel product lines with functional shoes bags specifically designed to protect footwear optimally. Using easy-to-clean materials and tough stitch construction, PT WIN ensures every detail is precisely manufactured to be a premium utility complement ready to carry your brand identity.

Material.title: BEST MATERIAL
Material.description: We curate the finest technical materials to ensure every product possesses cross-generational durability.

Team.title: The Solid
Team.description: Supported by experienced professionals who ensure every aspect of production and distribution runs with the highest quality standards.

Partner.title: Our Strategic
Partner.description: We collaborate with leading technology companies to deliver the best manufacturing solutions for the global market.

Footer.description: Delivering high-quality manufacturing solutions to support global infrastructure advancement through sustainable innovation.

Contact.title: Establish Strategic
Contact.description: Our expert team is ready to assist with technical inquiries or discuss your business partnership plans.

header.title: Facility & Infrastructure
header.subtitle: Complete facility support to ensure every production stage runs optimally.

main_production.title: Main Production Area
main_production.desc: Spacious production floor with an integrated workflow to efficiently handle large-volume orders.

sample_room.title: Sample Room
sample_room.desc: Where ideas and designs are first brought to life as precise product prototypes.

embroidery.title: Embroidery Facilities
embroidery.desc: Automated embroidery machines for applying logos and graphic details with high sharpness and neatness.

screen_printing.title: Screen Printing Area
screen_printing.desc: Manual and automated graphic printing facilities using quality inks for long-lasting results.

bartack.title: Bartack Station
bartack.desc: Special reinforcement on bag stress points to ensure maximum durability for heavy-duty use.

production_process.title: Production Process
production_process.desc: Every assembly stage is carried out with strict operational standards to maintain quality consistency.

guest_room.title: Guest Reception Room
guest_room.desc: A comfortable discussion area to welcome buyers and partners in planning product collaborations.
